title: MIKKUPPA 13ft/4m Car Jump Leads - 500AMP Heavy Duty Battery Booster Cables for Petrol and Diesel Car, SUV, Van, Truck with Gloves and Storage Bag Insulated
features: 【High-quality materials】 Fully PVC coated clamps to ensure high security; proper industrial PVC grips are heavily sprung to ensure a tight solid grip on the battery terminal.
【Thickened cables】 With 10mm² cross-section for safer use. The thickened cable won't broke easily and can be used for a longer time.
【Application widely】 CE approved, braided 500 high amperage copper core which capable of applying to 12V and 24V vehicles and other machines.
【Fully equipped】With practical gloves and storage bag. The package includes a pair of gloves and a storage bag. 4 Meters length makes it easy to reach from one car battery to another.
【After-sales service】 For your worry-free shopping experiences,MIKKUPPA Heavy Duty Jump Leads Professional promise a 1-year warranty and 100% free exchange if product is defective.
description: Product Description ----STRONG CLAMPS---- The clamps with strong jagged teeth and springs for excellent and strong jaws makes good grip force and connection easy with better conductivity and tension.Suits for various car battery end. ----GOOD PERFORMANCE---- The cable has thick inner core. And it is stays flexible even in very cold weather (-40℃/-40℉). CCA(Copper Coated Aluminum) and pure copper jaw one side for easy electrical conductivity and power transfer. ----PREMIUM PLIABLE CABLE---- Copper clad aluminum cables with an extra thick PVC Cover providing exclusive drop resistance and insulated protection. MIKKUPPA offer you best and durable quality booster cable only.
